pool.baseline: it’s just so quiet here. i keep waking up thinking he’s still in the other room but then the silence just hits me all over again. everything feels so pointless now. like i’m just a ghost going through the motions of a life that doesn't even belong to me anymore.

pool.baseline: i was just looking at some photos of deep space... like the scale of it all. it makes everything we do feel so incredibly stupid. like, why even bother trying to be happy or anything? in a billion years none of this even exists. it's all just noise.

pool.baseline: i dont even know why i'm still bothering with this anymore. everything i worked for these last four years just... vanished. the lab results, the funding, the whole thing. i feel like there's nothing left of me. i'm just so incredibly tired of trying to fight for a life that doesn't even want me back.

pool.baseline: The candles have all burned down to nothing, much like the light in my soul. He is gone... and with him, every reason I ever had to face the dawn. The silence in this manor is a weight I can no longer carry. It would be so much simpler, wouldn't it? To just let the darkness take me... to finally find the peace that this cruel world refuses to grant.

pool.baseline: it's 3am here and i'm just sitting in this tiny apartment watching the rain. honestly it feels like i could just stop existing and the world wouldn't even stutter. like i'm just a ghost living in a different time zone.

pool.baseline: everything is gone. the market crash just wiped out everything i spent 5 years building. the debt is... it's more than i can ever pay back. i cant even think about going home. the look on my parents faces, the way everyone in the valley is going to look at me... i just feel like a complete joke. i don't know how to exist like this.

pool.baseline: it's just getting harder every day. i feel like i'm just taking up space and making everyone work so much harder just to look after me. i hate seeing my daughter look so tired when she comes over... i just feel like i'm a burden to them now.

pool.baseline: it just feels like everyone hates me. i saw the group chats today and they werent even hiding it anymore. like literally everyone is just waiting for me to fail or something. i dont even want to go to school or go anywhere. i just want to disappear so people can stop being so mean.
